description: An OAuth Application defines namespace-scoped OAuth behavior and policy used by client registrations.

ID.description: ID is the identifier of the object.
ID.title: ID

allowedSources.description: Optional list of allowed interactive authentication sources. If omitted or empty, any supported interactive source in the namespace is allowed. Each entry is an Elemental filter expression evaluated against the resolved source object, such as its `name` and `namespace`.
allowedSources.title: allowedSources

audience.description: Audience to use for resulting a3s access tokens.
audience.title: audience

defaultScopes.description: Default scopes to use when a client does not request any scope.
defaultScopes.title: defaultScopes

enabled.description: If false, the OAuth application cannot be used.
enabled.title: enabled

importHash.description: The hash of the structure used to compare with new import version.
importHash.title: importHash

importLabel.description: The user-defined import label that allows the system to group resources from the same import operation.
importLabel.title: importLabel

name.description: The name of the OAuth application.
name.title: name

updateTime.description: Last update date of the object.
updateTime.title: updateTime

title: OAuthApplication
